1508000005.english: I was definitely at Zeta’s factory…

1508000006.english: Then I was engulfed by a massive light…

1508000007.korean: (응? 몸에 뭔가를 덮고… 이건 겉옷? 누구의?)
1508000007.english: (Huh? Something’s covering my body… Is this a coat? Whose?)

1508000010.english: Looks like you made it out okay, too.

1508000011.korean: 여기는 어디죠? 당신이 절 여기로 데리고 온 건가요?
1508000011.english: Where is this place? Did you bring me here?

1508000013.korean: - 그제야 오메가는 자신이 무의식적으로 소중하게 안고 있던 것이, 내 겉옷이라는 걸 눈치챘는지 얼굴을 붉혔다.
1508000013.english: - Only then did Omega realize, blushing, that the thing she’d been holding onto subconsciously was actually her own coat.

1508000014.korean: 가, 가져가세요! 쓸데없이 왜 이런 걸 덮어줘서!
1508000014.english: Take… take it! Why did you even bother putting this on me!

1508000015.korean: 그래서, 결국 여기는 어디죠? 우리는 분명 제타의 공장에 있었을 텐데요?
1508000015.english: So, where exactly are we? We were definitely at Zeta’s factory, right?

1508000016.korean: 그리고 왜 당신 혼자 있는 거죠? 다른 오르카 녀석들의 모습이 안 보이는데.
1508000016.english: And why are you alone? I don’t see any other Orca members.

1508000017.korean: 아까부터 대체 알 수 없는 소리를…
1508000017.english: Since earlier, you’ve been making some incomprehensible noises…

1508000018.korean: 알려주기 싫으면 됐어요. 직접 알아보면 될 테니.
1508000018.english: If you don’t want to tell me, that’s fine. I’ll find out myself.

1508000019.english: I’m going to get out of here.

1508000020.korean: - 오메가는 비틀거리며 자리에서 일어서더니 폐허의 출구를 찾아 걷기 시작했다.
1508000020.english: - Omega staggered, got to her feet, and started walking toward an exit of the ruin.

1508000022.korean: - 잠시 후, 폐허를 빠져나온 오메가는 받아들이기에는 너무나도 현실과 동떨어진 정보에 몸이 굳었다.
1508000022.english: - A moment later, after emerging from the ruin, Omega’s body froze, overwhelmed by information so far removed from reality it was hard to accept.

1508000024.korean: 여기는 저희가 알고 있던 세상이 맞나요?
1508000024.english: Is this the world we knew?

1508000025.english: - The scenery that greeted them as they left the ruin was…

1508000026.korean: - 온 세상이 붉게 빛나는 아무것도 없는 세계였다.
1508000026.english: - A world bathed in red light, empty of anything.

1508000028.korean: - 주변을 돌아다니며 탐색하던 중 오메가는 발을 헛디뎠는지 휘청거렸다.
1508000028.english: - While scouting around, Omega slipped and staggered.

1508000029.korean:
- 애초에 구출했을 때부터 만신창이인 상태였다.
오히려 지금까지 버틴 게 대단한 집념이라고 봐야겠지.
1508000029.english: - She’d been in a wrecked state since the rescue. Honestly, surviving this long is just sheer determination.

1508000031.korean:
절 신경 써서 하는 말이라면 필요 없어요.
아직 더 걸을 수 있어요.
1508000031.english: I don’t need you worrying about me. I can still keep going.

1508000032.korean: - 나는 주머니에서 수통을 꺼내 한 모금을 마신 뒤, 오메가에게 내밀었다.
1508000032.english: I pulled a water bottle from my pocket, took a sip, then handed it to Omega.

1508000034.korean: - 오메가는 어리둥절한 표정으로 내가 내민 수통을 천천히 받았다.
1508000034.english: Omega, looking puzzled, slowly took the bottle I offered.

1508000036.korean: 제가 지금 그런 걸 신경 쓰는지 아세요?
1508000036.english: Do you know if I even care about that right now?

1508000038.korean: - 그렇게 수통을 한참 동안 노려보더니 끝내 결심한 듯 한 모금 마시고는 나에게 돌려줬다.
1508000038.english: After staring at the bottle for a while, she finally took a decisive sip and handed it back to me.

1508000039.korean: - 결국 마실 거면서 뭘 그리 고민하는 건지.
1508000039.english: I wonder why she was hesitating when she was going to drink it anyway.

1508000040.korean: - 이번에는 다른 주머니에서 초코바를 꺼내 오메가에게 건넸다.
1508000040.english: This time I pulled a chocolate bar from another pocket and gave it to Omega.

1508000043.english: I’m… supposed to be your enemy, you know.

1508000044.korean: 제가 지금까지 당신에게 했던 짓들을… 카라카스에서 베타를 죽인 걸 잊기라도 했나요?
1508000044.english: Have you forgotten everything I’ve done to you… like killing Beta in Caracas?

1508000045.korean: - 오메가는 요정마을을 습격하여 모두를 세뇌 시키고, 몇 번이나 오르카 대원들을 위기에 빠트렸다.
1508000045.english: Omega raided Fairy Village, brainwashed everyone, and put the Orca members in danger multiple times.

1508000047.english: [c][00FF00]Big brother, the test you requested is finished.[/c]

1508000048.korean: 결과는 오빠가 말한 대로 베타 언니의 사인은… 총상에 의한 치명상이야.
1508000048.english: The result is as you said, Sister Beta’s cause of death… was a fatal gunshot wound.

1508000049.korean: 하지만, 총상이 아니었어도 베타 언니의 회로를 봤을 때 시간이 얼마 남지 않았을 거야.
1508000049.english: But even if it hadn’t been a gunshot, looking at Beta’s circuitry, she wouldn’t have had much time left.

1508000050.korean: 그리고 회로 과부하로 찾아오는 고통은 엄청나게 끔찍했을 거라고 생각해…
1508000050.english: And I think the pain from the circuit overload would have been incredibly terrible…

1508000051.korean: 이런 말을 하긴 뭐하지만… 오히려 이 결과가 베타 언니에게 있어서는 편안했을지도 몰라.
1508000051.english: I know this sounds odd, but perhaps this outcome was actually more comfortable for Beta.

1508000053.korean: [c][00FF00]베타 언니는 이렇게 편안한 웃는 얼굴로 잠들었으니까.[/c]
1508000053.english: [c][00FF00]Sister Beta fell asleep with a peaceful smile like that.[/c]

1508000055.korean:
좋을 대로 하시죠.
그 전에 여기서 벗어나야겠지만요.
1508000055.english: Do as you like. Though we should get out of here first.

1508000056.english: We’ve rested enough, let’s move again.

1508000057.english: I want to get out of here as fast as possible, even if it’s just one minute and one second.
